column1: 勝たんがために、あらゆる努力をした。

column3: In order to win, every possible effort was made.
column4: んがために (in order to, for the purpose of — literary/formal)
column5: Verb[ない-stem] + んがために / んがための + Noun
column6: literary formal expression of purpose; stronger and more elevated than ために
